author: Her

capabilities.description: Generate an image through AgentLLMAPI's OpenAI-compatible image endpoint. Use after user approval because it can incur network usage and cost.

model.description: Optional image model route alias. Defaults to gpt-image-2; the deployment also lists linkyun-image-default and nano-banana-pro-preview (availability depends on server-side routes).

prompt.description: Detailed visual prompt for image generation.

size.description: Image size supported by the configured AgentLLM route.

capabilities.title: Generate image

description: AgentLLMAPI-backed creative media tools exposed through Her Desktop's plugin runtime.
name: AgentLLM Media
systemPromptAddendum: Use AgentLLM Media when the user explicitly asks to generate visual assets. Ask for approval before spending network/model resources, and summarize returned URLs or artifacts clearly.
